case_title: ERIC WRIGHT VS. MAYSA ODEH ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. MAYSA ODEH AND LUAI ODAH DOES NOT OWE ERIC WRIGHT ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUNE-29-2015. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H.S. COMMINS, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ODEH, MAYSA ODEH, LUAI $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,975.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 27,2015 in Department 525:
Counsel Michael Lloyd Smith, Esq. for Appellants/Defendants Maysa Odeh who is present and Luai Odeh is not present.
Respondent/Plaintiff Eric Wright appears as Propria Persona.

Respondent Eric Wright summarizes his side of the claim.
Counsel Mr. Smith summarizes appellants Odah's side of the claim.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Eric Wright testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit Not Marked - copy of statues.

Counsel Mr. Smith testifies on behalf of appellants Odeh and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit Not Marked - copy of 3903(j)

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Judgment Entered
